positive: Stylized, geometric arrangement of forest animals (fox, owl, bear cub, deer) and botanical elements (fern fronds, stylized mushrooms, wildflowers). The composition should feature clean, sharp silhouettes against a distressed, cream-colored background. Art style should be vintage Scandinavian folk art meets modern negative space illustration. Use a limited, earthy color palette: deep forest greens, muted terracotta reds, charcoal blacks, and cream ivory. The overall aesthetic must be highly contrasted, vector-like, and suitable for high-quality apparel printing. Focus on central, balanced symmetry.
